description: Order item 3 (load-manifest / loader transformation) reaches a hard, evidence-backed blocker: the admitted GPTQ artifact's routed-expert representation is incompatible with the installed Transformers 5.13.1 source class, with no deterministic pinned loader transformation. A conversion may NOT be improvised. Aggregate-only; source-inspection + metadata only, no weights.

evidence: transformers 5.13.1 Qwen3_5MoeExperts stores routed experts as packed 3D nn.Parameter per layer (gate_up_proj[num_experts, 2*intermediate, hidden]; down_proj[num_experts, hidden, intermediate]) indexed by gate_up_proj[expert_idx] -- plain parameters, not nn.Linear modules
the GPTQ artifact stores 256 numbered per-expert 2D linears mlp.experts.{e}.{gate_proj,up_proj,down_proj} with GPTQ tensors qweight/qzeros/scales/g_idx
GPTQ quantizes nn.Linear modules and has no mechanism to quantize a packed 3D parameter, so the artifact was quantized against an older per-expert-Linear modeling structure

the source modeling carries no _checkpoint_conversion_mapping, register_load_state_dict_pre_hook, load_hook, or _load_from_state_dict mapping numbered per-expert GPTQ tensors into the packed parameters

consequence: the current GPTQ(3af5ca29) + transformers-5.13.1 combination cannot strictly load the admitted text-only class; module-SET equality (693==693) holds but tensor-level strict loadability does NOT. Per steer, a conversion may not be improvised after inspecting weights.
resolution_options_for_operator: pin an immutable Transformers runtime whose Qwen3.5-MoE routed experts use the per-expert-Linear representation matching the GPTQ artifact (intersects order item 8: pin the exact TP/quantization/runtime), then re-run the load-manifest gate
admit a different quantized checkpoint whose expert representation matches the pinned runtime
a separately resourced BF16/FP8 path or a smaller admitted dense engineering model
privacy: aggregate-only; representation labels + booleans, no tensor names/values, weights, caches, or local paths
